subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

It was great connecting at the conference last month. I'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might collaborate.

I'm available at the following times, all 14:00–16:00 UTC:
- Monday, April 21, 2026
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026

Please confirm which slot suits you best.

Regarding your request for direct contact details: I’m unable to share internal contact information or phone numbers. Please refer to our public website for general contact information.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
